title_header: THE GOD OF HIGH SCHOOL CHAPTER: THE MATCH WITH GODS. STORY/DRAWING BY YONGJE PARK. ASSISTED BY MADE IN KOREA. EPISODE 6.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The unexpected situation drives people into panic, and a few common reactions start taking place:

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Some calculate who is stronger, or even weaker than themselves.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Unfortunately, kids like these are quite unable to make it to the finals, since they're afraid.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: While people can instantly check on others' physical levels through this simple system, there's actually a clever psychological test hidden within it.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Those with higher levels cling onto their strength;

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: While those with lower levels squirm in their presence;

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Those who trust their own strength without getting distracted by levels or stats...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: They have what it takes to make it to the finals. People like them:

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, you! If you're gonna keep twiddling your thumbs then just go home.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Your movements are way too big.

dialogue.speaker: MIRA YOO
dialogue.line: I'll make you crawl beneath my feet!

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER
dialogue.line: Now, should we finalize the preliminaries?

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER
dialogue.line: There is one more participant left.

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER
dialogue.line: He was a bit late due to the extra procedures needed for his status.

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER
dialogue.line: If we only qualified based on talent, he is the strongest candidate to win.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Not one person moved hastily. Their instincts grew sensitive at the imminence of danger.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Oh? You dodged that? You must be pretty good.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: There's no need to thank me as I didn't do it to help you.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Don't mind it. It's just, I don't really like that dude.

summary: The preliminaries for the God of High School tournament begin with a chaotic free-for-all, testing participants' physical and psychological strength. Several martial artists are introduced, showcasing their skills. As the preliminaries near their end, a powerful new participant, Manseok Gang, arrives, followed by the protagonist, Mori Jin.
